author: y4rr
content:
Result: implemented real intermediate feature extraction in ferrotorch-vision.

**Trait `IntermediateFeatures<T>`** (new): exposes `forward_features(input) -> HashMap<String, Tensor<T>>` with stable per-stage node names plus `feature_node_names()` to discover them. Models implementing this trait expose every intermediate stage in addition to their final output. The pattern (override the standard forward to also stash intermediates into a HashMap) is straightforward to extend to other architectures.

**ResNet impl:** stages are named `stem`, `layer1`, `layer2`, `layer3`, `layer4`, `avgpool`, `fc` — matching the torchvision convention. forward_features runs the full forward pass and inserts each stage's tensor into the result map. The `fc` entry is exactly the same tensor that `Module::forward` returns (verified by test).

**FeatureExtractor<T, M>:** generic wrapper over any `M: IntermediateFeatures<T>`. Constructor validates that every requested return_node is a valid name on the wrapped model and errors with a clear message + valid node list when not. `forward(input)` runs forward_features and returns only the requested subset.

The previous stub stored a model + return_nodes Vec but ignored the names and just returned the final output (with a comment saying "per-layer feature extraction requires model-internal hooks, which will be added per-architecture"). This is now real.

**Tests added (6):**
- `test_resnet_intermediate_features_keys` — verifies all 7 expected node names are present
- `test_feature_extractor_filters_to_requested_nodes` — requests layer3 and layer4 from a ResNet-18 forward, verifies the returned map has exactly those 2 keys with the expected channel counts (256 and 512)
- `test_feature_extractor_rejects_unknown_node` — constructor errors on bogus name with helpful message including available node list
- `test_feature_extractor_full_forward_features_includes_all_nodes` — every named stage appears in forward_features output
- `test_feature_extractor_final_output_matches_module_forward` — element-by-element check that the `fc` intermediate equals `Module::forward` (within 1e-5)
- `test_feature_extractor_empty_return_nodes_returns_empty_map` — degenerate case

Also fixed an unrelated test ordering bug in `test_pretrained_lookup_known_model_in_hub` (added in #385): it was iterating list_models() from the global REGISTRY, which contains test-injected dummy models from other tests. Switched to a hardcoded canonical list of architectures for the assertion.

234 ferrotorch-vision lib tests pass (was 228, +6). No new warnings.

**Remaining work:** `IntermediateFeatures` is implemented for ResNet only. The trait is the right hook for the other architectures (VGG, ViT, EfficientNet, ConvNeXt, Swin, etc.) but each needs its own forward_features impl with stage names. Filing as a follow-up issue for incremental rollout — the ResNet template makes each subsequent impl mechanical.
